titleStmt.title: SII 25.113: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 113. (A.R. No. 113 of 1908.) TIRUPPATTŪR, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMANATHAPURAM DISTRICT.

summary.p: West wall of the Agastyēśvara shrine in the Tiruttaḷīśvara temple.
The details of the date of the record viz., Śaka 1457, Jaya, Dakshiṇāyana, Kaṟkaṭaka, Amāvāsya, Saturday, Pushya-nakshatra, Vajra-yōga, Nāganakaraṇa regularly correspond to 1534 A.D., Jully 11.

It records the grant of the wet and dry lands in the village Varaguṇapputtūr, a dēvadāṉa village belonging to the deity Tiruttaḷiyāṇḍa-nāyanār of Tirupputtūr, a brahmadēya in Kēraḷaśiṅga-vaḷanāḍu, as kuḍinīṅgādēvadāna and kaḍamai-kāṇi, to Pāṇḍipperumāḷ Kāliṅgarāyar, son of Śaravaṇaip-perumāḷ, the accountant of the temple at Tirupputtūr. The village Varaguṇapputtūr was originally granted as a dēvadāṉa to the deity Tiruttaḷiyāṇḍa-nāyanār by Gaṅgā-nāyakkar. Pāppukumma-nāyakkar, the agent (kāryattuk-kaḍavar) of Viśvanātha-nāyakkar, son of Nāgamanāyakkar, the ūḻiyam of the ruling king, for the merit of Viśvanāthanāyakkar. The shepherd of the place Pōttukuḍi by the name Aḻagukōṉ Pirayān had to collect the taxes from the settlements of the village which is to be maintained as a dēvadāṉa-kuḍi of the deity Tiruttaḷiyāṇḍa-nāyanār and carry out the orders of the tānattār of the temple. The measure called kūttāḍi is mentioned to measure out the 15 kalam of paddy for one mā of land as per the Tirupputtūr measure for the wet lands in the aforesaid dēvadāṉa village.
The boundaries of the gift village Varaguṇapputtūr Vēlaṅguḍi-kuḷam and Vāṭpālaiṅgāḍu of the old dēvadāṉa village of the deity in the east, Śēṉāvaraiyaṉ canal in the south and Vēḷārpaḷḷam in the east.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīman mahāmaṇṭaleśvaran Ariyarāya vibhāṭan bhāṣaikku tappuva
rāya kaṇṭan muvarāyara kaṇḍan kaṇḍa nāṭu koṇṭu koṇṭa nāṭu kuṭātān
rājādhirājan rājaparameśvaran pūrvvadakṣiṇa paścima Uttarasa mudrādhipati
śrīmat Acyutadevamahārāyar pradhivirājyam paṇṇi śakābdam
1000 4 100 5 10 7 Itaṉ meṟcellāniṉṟa jayasamvatsarattu dakṣi ttu kaṭaka nāyaṟṟu
Amāvāsyaiyum mandavāramum puṣya nakṣatramum vajrayogamum nāgavakaraṇamum peṟṟa
ṉāḷ Ūḻiyattu nākama nāyakkar putran viśvanātha nāya kkar kārittukkaṭavār Āla�r kaṅkā
nāyakkar parappu kummanāyakkar keraḷaciṅ kavaḷanāṭṭu brahmadeyan tirupputtūr nā
yiṉār tiruttaḷiyāṇṭa nāyanāṟkku tevatāṉamāka viṭṭa varakuṇaputtūṟku perunāṉ
kellai Āvatu kīḻpāṟkellai Iṉṉāyiṉār paḻanteva tāṉamāṉa kṣetra velaṅkuṭi kuḷattukkum veṭ
pālaiṅkāṭṭukkum meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai ceṉāvaraiyaṉ kālukkum vaṭakkum meṟpā
ṟ kellai veḷār paḷḷattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟ kellai kāvuṭaiyāḷukkum kaṟukkāy Ellaikkum teṟkum
Āka peru nāṟkellaikkuḷ paṭṭa nañcai puñcai nidhi nikṣepam mutal Aṣṭabhogaṅkaḷum
tiruttaḷiyāṇṭa nāyanār tevatāṉam Āka viśvanātha- nāyakkar puṇṇyamāka varakuṇa
puttūr tevatāṉamāka Anubhavittukoḷḷavum tiruputtūṟ koyil kaṇakku cāvaṇaip perumāḷ putran pāṇ
ṭip perumāḷ kāliṅkarāyaṟku kuṭiniṅkāt tevatāṉam kaṭaḷamakāṇiyāṭci Āka nañcai tirupputtūṟpaṭi Oru mānilattukku kūt
tāṭiyāl patiṉañcuṅkapaṭi kalamāka nellu Aṟukalamum puñceykku nālattoṉṟākavum pāṇṭip perumāḷ kāliṅkarāya
ṟku varakuṇa puttūr muṟṟum nañcey muṟṟum puñcai muṟṟum kuṭi nīṅkāt tevatāṉam Āka kaṭamai kāṇiyāka cantrāditya va
ṟ san=tatipraveśam Anubhavittu koḷḷavum pottu kuṭiyil Irukkiṟa Iṭaiyaṉ Aḻaku koṉpirayāntiruttaḷi yāṇṭa
nayiṉār tevatāṉa kuṭiyāka koyil kuṭiyāka Eṉṟeṉṟaikkum Iṟaikaram Iṟuttu koyil tāṉattār coṉṉatu keṭṭu
koyil kuṭiyarāyirukkavum
Digital edition of SII 25.113 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
